_note: Style and outfit transfer: 'put me in this.' Upload an outfit/style reference image alongside your face reference. Uses the style-transfer IP-Adapter to apply the look while FaceID preserves your identity. Great for fashion concepts, costume ideas, branded looks.
template: photorealistic portrait of {subject} wearing {outfit}, {setting}, {lighting}, fashion photography quality, sharp details, professional styling, 8K detail
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low quality, deformed face, extra limbs, wrong person, different person, cartoon, painting, mannequin

outfit.label: Outfit / look description (e.g., 'luxury black suit', 'futuristic armor')

rubric.identity: 1-5 — does this look like the same person as the reference?
rubric.outfit_accuracy: 1-5 — does the outfit match what was requested?
